basic_details.job_title: ESIC Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 45 Teaching Faculty, Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest ESIC Medical College Varanasi (ESIC Varanasi) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident posts! Published on 18-05-2026 at ESIC Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 45 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 69 years age group and possessing an MD/MS degree in the concerned subject as per NMC norms can apply through email from 18-05-2026 to 27-05-2026. Find all details about the ESIC Varanasi Teaching Faculty and Senior Resident new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application form, and notification PDF her

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS in the concerned Subject as per NMC norms
qualification.details: Professor: MD/MS in the concerned Subject as per NMC norms Associate Professor: MD/MS in the concerned Subject as per NMC norms Assistant Professor: MD/MS in the concerned Subject as per NMC norms Senior Resident: MD/MS in the concerned Subject as per NMC norms

salary_details.details: Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 1,23,100/- and other allowances as admissible Associate Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 78,800/- and other allowances as admissible Assistant Professor: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- and other allowances as admissible Senior Resident: Fixed Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- and other allowances as admissible

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Varanasi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Varanasi Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to send the scanned application via email is 27th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Faculty at ESIC Varanasi?
faq.answer: There are a total of 45 vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts announced by ESIC Medical College Varanasi in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for all Teaching Faculty posts is an MD/MS in the concerned subject as per NMC norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 69 years. Specific age relaxation details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ESIC Varanasi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email to the designated address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 67,700/- to Rs. 1,23,100/- per month, with specific pay scales for Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and Senior Resident posts.

faq.question: Q8. When will the walk-in interviews be conducted?
faq.answer: Walk-in interviews are scheduled for 29th May 2026 and 30th May 2026, depending on the specific department/specialty.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Teaching Faculty positions at ESIC Varanasi will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page or by visiting the official ESIC website.
